en: Department of Construction Engineering established, College of Engineering & Science
First class admitted to Department of Construction Engineering
Separated into the Department of Mechanical Engineering, College of Engineering

kr: 이공대학 공학부 기계공학과 첫 신입생 입학
en: First class admitted to Department of Mechanical Engineering

kr: 이공대학 공학부 기계공학과 첫 졸업생 졸업
en: First graduating class of Department of Mechanical Engineering
Industrial Machinery major established at the Graduate School of Industry
Industrial Machinery major (re-)established at the Graduate School of Industry

kr: 산업대학원 산업기계전공이 기계공학 전공으로 전공명칭 변경
en: Industrial Machinery major renamed to Mechanical Engineering major at the Graduate School of Industry
Integrated into the School of Mechanical & Electrical Engineering
Department of Mechanical Engineering and Department of Mechanical Design merged into a single Mechanical Engineering major
Separated from the School of Mechanical & Electronics Engineering to become an independent School of Mechanical Engineering (current admissions quota: 180)
Joined the ABEEK (Accreditation Board for Engineering Education of Korea) program
50th anniversary of the founding of the Department of Mechanical Engineering
Signed agreement for Phase 3 BK21 Plus program
